case_title: MEBA ZENA ADMASSU ET AL VS. ALEXANDER SOSENSKY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSELASSIE, ZENA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-04-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MEBA ZENA ADMASSU IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ZENA TSELASSIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER SOSENSKY IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT VOIR DIRES THE VALIDITY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE AND FINDS IT IS DEFECTIVE. SERVICE MUST BE REDONE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO INCREASE AMOUNT DEFENDANT OWES FROM 4000.00 TO $4850.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSELASSIE, ZENA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED OCT-16-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOSENSKY, ALEXANDER
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-03-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-25-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,850.00 FILED BY ADMASSU, MEBA ZENA TSELASSIE, ZENA AS TO DEFENDANT SOSENSKY, ALEXANDER
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY ADMASSU, MEBA ZENA TSELASSIE, ZENA AS TO DEFENDANT SOSENSKY, ALEXANDER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSELASSIE, ZENA AS TO DEFENDANT SOSENSKY, ALEXANDER
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
